## Description

<!-- A clear and concise summary of what this PR does and why.
     Link to the issue it resolves, if applicable. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Tool database addition / update

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe how you verified your changes. Include steps so reviewers can reproduce. -->

- [ ] Ran `pnpm dev` and manually tested the affected flows
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests (run with `pnpm test`)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Tested with a real Supabase project (not just mocks)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my code and removed debug logs / commented-out code
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in `apps/web/.env.local.example`
- [ ] New public-facing UI strings are accessible (keyboard-navigable, sufficient contrast)
- [ ] If this adds a migration, I have tested it against a fresh Supabase project
